must_fix: Prevent non-terminal closureStatus updates from overwriting an already resolved/transferred support incident; preserve terminal closure state and closedAt unless an explicit, audited terminal-to-terminal transition is intended.
evidence: packages/db/src/support.ts:297 applies next.closureStatus whenever scalarFieldUpdates.closureStatus is true and sets closedAt to null for non-terminal values; apps/core/src/support/support-evidence.ts:546-580 forwards any parsed closureStatus from PATCH into that scalar update path; current support tests only cover stale evidence preserving terminal state when closureStatus is omitted, not explicit reopen.

notes: FAIL: terminal support incidents can be reopened by a later update, clearing closedAt and weakening closure evidence.
